Sl. 19. If Saturn is Anapha Yoga Karta. the native will have broad
shoulders, will be a leader. will quickty grasp others' words, will

Now he tells about the results of Ohurdhura Yoga formed be at
least any two of the five planets (Mars. etc.) being on both
sides of Moon.
Sl. 20. A native born in Ohurdhura Yoga formed by Mars and Mecwry
on both sides of Moon will be a liar. excessively weakhy, an
expert. very cruel. will possess good behaviour, will be patient
(polle}. and will be fond of elderly bad women.
